meta.title: System Vision & Principles
meta.excerpt: Core architectural principles and design philosophy guiding this application. Understanding the 'why' behind technical decisions.

seo.metaDescription: Learn the core principles and architectural decisions that shape this modern web application.

props.title: Building Software for the Long Term
props.body: This application was designed with a 10-year architectural horizon in mind. Every decision prioritizes clarity, type safety, and maintainability over short-term convenience.

features.title: Server-First Design
features.description: Minimize client-side JavaScript, leverage server capabilities for performance and security

features.title: Atomic Components
features.description: Reusable building blocks from atoms → molecules → organisms following atomic design

features.title: Type Safety End-to-End
features.description: From API contracts to UI components - TypeScript everywhere prevents runtime surprises

features.title: Content as Data
features.description: Flexible dynamic zones in Strapi enable content without code changes

props.text: Every framework and library choice was evaluated against four criteria: community support, type safety, performance impact, and long-term maintenance burden.

features.title: Next.js 15 + React 19
features.description: Server components for architectural clarity, App Router for intuitive routing, built-in optimization

features.title: Strapi CMS
features.description: Headless CMS with dynamic zones for flexible content modeling without schema migrations

features.title: TypeScript Strict Mode
features.description: Eliminates entire categories of bugs before runtime, forces explicitness in code

features.title: Tailwind + shadcn/ui
features.description: Utility-first CSS for rapid iteration, unstyled components for brand customization

rows: Reduced boilerplate, better DX, fewer bugs
Zero runtime errors from SSR/Client divergence
API contracts enforced, impossible states prevented

props.title: Architecture for Growth
props.content: This system is intentionally built to support 10 years of evolution. The atomic component system enables rapid feature development, while the server-first architecture ensures scalability and the type system prevents entire classes of bugs.
